channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: White van immobile for 2 months and someone living in it, 16th April
item.description:
The white van has been there for 2 months now and someone is living in it. It needs to be moved. You can see he showers by the van and spreads his towel on the front chair. And he cooks out the back of the van. It needs to be moved on please as it is very concerning.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress left on street, 16th April
item.description:
I would like to report a mattress that has been left on the side of the road of parkdale road se181rw. This has been there for several weeks now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fox Hollow Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes, 16th April
item.description:
Deep potholes at the entrance to the station, just were pedestrians are crossing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaville Way, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House rubbish, 16th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chilver Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on street outside Dekker House, 16th April
item.description:
Two men in a transit van sorted and dumped this rubbish on the street outside Dekker House on the pavement, opposite Hopewell Yard. I have the number plate of the vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hopewell Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking double yellow lines, 16th April
item.description:
This vehicle regularly at night parks illegally on double yellow lines narrowing the entry/exit out of Bastion Road into Wickham Lane SE2.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bastion Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked Paving, 16th April
item.description:
As reported several times over the last year. Tree roots continue to crack all the paving outside 56 and 58 west Hallowes. Road also has a huge crack in the same area. All reports previously reported about this has been deleted by greenwich for some reason. Maybe you could address the entire street as the paving is very dangerous in many places in west hallowes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Hallowes, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping /fire hazzard, 16th April
item.description:
Fly-tipping in an area next to l&q properties. L&q confirmed is not the owner so it has to be council.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bristow Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in the verges again, 16th April
item.description:
Why can it just be regularly cleaned rather than me reporting it every week over and over again? Isn’t it a public land that has to be cleaned as regularly as the pavements? Seems like a bare minimum to me…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-ipping and bonfires, 16th April
item.description:
This has been an ongoing situation with the neighbours in the next block they keep adding rubbish to the back garden (fly- tipping) and lifting up the back fence via a van and rubbish has been accumulating during the week and bonfires has been happening at 01:30am on Monday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a pot hole on the bend, 16th April
item.description:
All your previous hole stated this has been fixed. IT hasn’t and this pot hole needs filling asap. A moped rider could come off as it’s a large and unexpected pot hole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with flat tyre, 16th April
item.description:
Abandoned car with flat tyre that hasn’t moved for many months. Looks like it’s been abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large overgrowing bush blocking pathway, 16th April
item.description:
This bush has been here for a while and has taken over half of the pathway and if anybody walks opposite me one of us has to go on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meadowford Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped waste, 16th April
item.description:
Fly tipped waste outside the entrance of the electrical substation

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Commercial Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste in playing fields, 16th April
item.description:
There is dumped waste inside the bull lane playing fields, next to the pavement but inside the playing fields

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amersham Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 fordwych road, 16th April
item.description:
There is a pothole that is getting worse and causing damage to cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Fordwych Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open green box of wires, 16th April
item.description:
Green box full of wires is open
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oaklands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large hole in the pavement by tree outside Gail's Bakery on Bromley Road., 16th April
item.description:
There is a large hole in the pavement by the tree opposite the entrance to Gails Bakery on Bromley Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-43, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St George's car park fly tipping near grey locker, 16th April
item.description:
Once again fly tipping has been done by the right-hand side of the grey locker. This consist of a large table, and broken bed stead various shoes and filled glass jars. Also behind the locker is a lot of rubbish and as well as being cleared needs a deep clean. Please could this be cleared as soon as possible, these items have been dumped at least three weeks ago. Thank you..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign old and faded, 16th April
item.description:
Bend ahead sign is old and faded and needs replacing please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
